message:
You know those moments when your dog just knows things before you do? The other day, I was busy preparing for a little weekend getaway, and I thought I had everything in order. But my pup, Charlie, kept giving me that look—like, "Are you really ready for this?" Sure enough, just as we were about to leave, I realized I hadn’t packed his emergency kit. Cue the smug ‘I told you so’ moment from my furry friend as I scrambled to put together his essentials. 

It’s funny how our pets can teach us about preparedness in the simplest ways. A quick refresher on emergency plans (like having a little stash ready for them too) can really save the day! 

Have you ever had a similar moment with your pet? What did they teach you?
